CM Config File:tftp://10.0.0.1/f820d279cca5_918212ae502da62b2f058f2d065a51a9.cm
Warning: The modem does not store copies of its configuration files. Below you will find the currently used values of parameters commonly set using these files. The files may or may not set these values or contain additional information. This information is listed for convenience only.
 Common CM Config Parameters 
NetworkAccess = Yes
UpgradeServer = 172.22.48.1
MaxCpeAllowed = 2
PrivacyEnable = 1
SnmpMib = docsDevSwAdminStatus.0 2
SnmpMib = arrisCmDoc30AccessHttpTimeout.0 10
UpstreamServiceFlow =
    SfReference = 0
#   SfId = 99368970  -- assigned by CMTS, correlates to PcSfId
    SfClassName = ""
    SfQosSetType = 7
    SfTrafficPriority = 1
    SfMaxTrafficRate = 128000
    SfMaxTrafficBurst = 3044
    SfMinReservedRate = 0
    SfMinReservedRatePktsize = 0
    SfActiveQosTimeout = 0
    SfAdmittedQosTimeout = 200
    SfMaxConcatBurst = 1522
    SfSchedulingType  = 2
DownstreamServiceFlow =
    SfReference = 0
#   SfId = 99377163  -- assigned by CMTS, correlates to PcSfId
    SfClassName = ""
    SfQosSetType = 7
    SfTrafficPriority = 1
    SfMaxTrafficRate = 128000
    SfMaxTrafficBurst = 3044
    SfMinReservedRate = 0
    SfMinReservedRatePktsize = 0
    SfActiveQosTimeout = 0
    SfAdmittedQosTimeout = 200
DownstreamServiceFlow =
    SfReference = 0
#   SfId = 99377164  -- assigned by CMTS, correlates to PcSfId
    SfClassName = ""
    SfQosSetType = 7
    SfTrafficPriority = 1
    SfMaxTrafficRate = 1126400
    SfMaxTrafficBurst = 3044
    SfMinReservedRate = 0
    SfMinReservedRatePktsize = 0
    SfActiveQosTimeout = 0
    SfAdmittedQosTimeout = 200

DownstreamPacketClassification =
    PcServiceFlow = 99377164
    PcIdentifier = 11
    PcRulePriority = 0
    PcActivationState = 1
        PcIpProtocol = 6
        PcIpDestPortStart = 0
        PcIpDestPortEnd = 65535
DownstreamPacketClassification =
    PcServiceFlow = 99377164
    PcIdentifier = 12
    PcRulePriority = 0
    PcActivationState = 1
        PcIpProtocol = 6
        PcIpDestPortStart = 0
        PcIpDestPortEnd = 65535

    PcIdentifier = 13
    PcRulePriority = 0
    PcActivationState = 1
        PcIpProtocol = 6
        PcIpDestPortStart = 0

# Note: Items assigned by CMTS are not included in the config file.
#       PcSfId maps to Instance of docsQosServiceFlowTable.
